---
title: "Roberto Park"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero-demo">
  <div class="hero-demo-label">Option 1 — Gradient + typewriter</div>
  <div class="hero hero-typewriter">
    <div class="hero-name-gradient">Roberto Park</div>
    <div class="hero-role">
      I'm a <span id="typed-role"></span><span class="typed-cursor">|</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="hero-demo">
  <div class="hero-demo-label">Option 2 — Animated mesh backdrop</div>
  <div class="hero hero-mesh">
    <div class="mesh-blob mesh-blob-1"></div>
    <div class="mesh-blob mesh-blob-2"></div>
    <div class="mesh-blob mesh-blob-3"></div>
    <div class="hero-mesh-content">
      <div class="hero-name">Roberto Park</div>
      <div class="hero-tagline">Data · AI · Tools</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="hero-demo">
  <div class="hero-demo-label">Option 3 — Terminal prompt</div>
  <div class="hero hero-terminal">
    <div class="terminal-header">
      <span class="dot red"></span>
      <span class="dot yellow"></span>
      <span class="dot green"></span>
      <span class="terminal-title">roberto@portfolio ~ </span>
    </div>
    <pre class="terminal-body" id="terminal-body"></pre>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="hero-demo">
  <div class="hero-demo-label">Option 4 — Subtle gradient only</div>
  <div class="hero hero-subtle">
    <div class="hero-name-gradient hero-name-gradient-slow">Roberto Park</div>
    <div class="hero-tagline">Data Scientist &amp; AI Engineer</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="hero-demo">
  <div class="hero-demo-label">Option 5 — Pixel-art lifeline</div>
  <div class="hero hero-pixelart">
    <svg class="pa-canvas" viewBox="0 0 160 40" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <!-- Neutral sky for ages 0–4 -->
      <rect class="pa-sky" width="160" height="33" fill="#1e1e2e"/>

      <!-- Guatemala flag backdrop (ages 4–18) -->
      <g class="pa-flag pa-flag-guate" opacity="0">
        <rect x="0"   y="0" width="53" height="33" fill="#4997D0"/>
        <rect x="53"  y="0" width="54" height="33" fill="#ffffff"/>
        <rect x="107" y="0" width="53" height="33" fill="#4997D0"/>
        <!-- Tiny center emblem -->
        <circle cx="80" cy="16.5" r="3" fill="none" stroke="#3a7e2a" stroke-width="0.6"/>
        <rect x="79" y="14" width="2" height="5" fill="#3a7e2a"/>
      </g>

      <!-- South Korea flag backdrop (ages 18–29) -->
      <g class="pa-flag pa-flag-korea" opacity="0">
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="160" height="33" fill="#ffffff"/>
        <!-- Taegeuk: red top / blue bottom split by S-curve -->
        <g transform="translate(80, 16.5)">
          <path d="M -6,0 A 6,6 0 0,1 6,0 A 3,3 0 0,1 0,0 A 3,3 0 0,0 -6,0 Z" fill="#CD2E3A"/>
          <path d="M -6,0 A 6,6 0 0,0 6,0 A 3,3 0 0,0 0,0 A 3,3 0 0,1 -6,0 Z" fill="#0047A0"/>
        </g>
        <!-- Four trigrams (simplified) -->
        <g fill="#0b0b14">
          <!-- top-left ☰ -->
          <rect x="15" y="9"  width="10" height="1"/>
          <rect x="15" y="11" width="10" height="1"/>
          <rect x="15" y="13" width="10" height="1"/>
          <!-- top-right ☵ -->
          <rect x="135" y="9"  width="10" height="1"/>
          <rect x="135" y="11" width="4"  height="1"/>
          <rect x="141" y="11" width="4"  height="1"/>
          <rect x="135" y="13" width="10" height="1"/>
          <!-- bottom-left ☲ -->
          <rect x="15" y="20" width="4"  height="1"/>
          <rect x="21" y="20" width="4"  height="1"/>
          <rect x="15" y="22" width="10" height="1"/>
          <rect x="15" y="24" width="4"  height="1"/>
          <rect x="21" y="24" width="4"  height="1"/>
          <!-- bottom-right ☷ -->
          <rect x="135" y="20" width="4"  height="1"/>
          <rect x="141" y="20" width="4"  height="1"/>
          <rect x="135" y="22" width="4"  height="1"/>
          <rect x="141" y="22" width="4"  height="1"/>
          <rect x="135" y="24" width="4"  height="1"/>
          <rect x="141" y="24" width="4"  height="1"/>
        </g>
      </g>

      <!-- Ground -->
      <rect x="0" y="33" width="160" height="7" fill="#313244"/>
      <rect x="0" y="33" width="160" height="1" fill="#45475a"/>

      <!-- Character group (positioned by JS each frame) -->
      <g class="pa-char" transform="translate(0, 28)">
        <!-- Baby crawling (used 0–3) -->
        <g class="pa-sprite pa-baby">
          <rect x="4" y="0" width="2" height="1" fill="#2a2a2a"/>
          <rect x="3" y="1" width="3" height="1" fill="#f5c2a7"/>
          <rect x="0" y="2" width="6" height="1" fill="#74c7ec"/>
          <rect x="0" y="3" width="1" height="2" fill="#45475a"/>
          <rect x="3" y="3" width="1" height="2" fill="#45475a"/>
          <rect x="5" y="3" width="1" height="2" fill="#f5c2a7"/>
        </g>
        <!-- Toddler (used 3–4) -->
        <g class="pa-sprite pa-toddler" style="display:none">
          <rect x="0" y="0" width="3" height="1" fill="#2a2a2a"/>
          <rect x="0" y="1" width="3" height="2" fill="#f5c2a7"/>
          <rect x="0" y="3" width="3" height="3" fill="#f38ba8"/>
          <rect x="0" y="6" width="1" height="2" fill="#45475a"/>
          <rect x="2" y="6" width="1" height="2" fill="#45475a"/>
        </g>
        <!-- Kid (used 4–12) -->
        <g class="pa-sprite pa-kid" style="display:none">
          <rect x="1" y="0" width="3" height="1" fill="#2a2a2a"/>
          <rect x="1" y="1" width="3" height="2" fill="#f5c2a7"/>
          <rect x="1" y="3" width="3" height="4" fill="#a6e3a1"/>
          <rect x="0" y="4" width="1" height="3" fill="#f5c2a7"/>
          <rect x="4" y="4" width="1" height="3" fill="#f5c2a7"/>
          <rect x="1" y="7" width="1" height="4" fill="#45475a"/>
          <rect x="3" y="7" width="1" height="4" fill="#45475a"/>
        </g>
        <!-- Teen (used 12–18) -->
        <g class="pa-sprite pa-teen" style="display:none">
          <rect x="1" y="0" width="3" height="1" fill="#2a2a2a"/>
          <rect x="1" y="1" width="3" height="3" fill="#f5c2a7"/>
          <rect x="1" y="4" width="3" height="5" fill="#cba6f7"/>
          <rect x="0" y="5" width="1" height="4" fill="#f5c2a7"/>
          <rect x="4" y="5" width="1" height="4" fill="#f5c2a7"/>
          <rect x="1" y="9" width="1" height="5" fill="#45475a"/>
          <rect x="3" y="9" width="1" height="5" fill="#45475a"/>
        </g>
        <!-- Adult (used 18+) -->
        <g class="pa-sprite pa-adult" style="display:none">
          <rect x="1" y="0" width="3" height="1" fill="#2a2a2a"/>
          <rect x="1" y="1" width="3" height="3" fill="#f5c2a7"/>
          <rect x="1" y="4" width="3" height="6" fill="#89b4fa"/>
          <rect x="0" y="5" width="1" height="5" fill="#f5c2a7"/>
          <rect x="4" y="5" width="1" height="5" fill="#f5c2a7"/>
          <rect x="1" y="10" width="1" height="7" fill="#1e1e2e"/>
          <rect x="3" y="10" width="1" height="7" fill="#1e1e2e"/>
        </g>
      </g>

      <!-- Age display (top-right corner) -->
      <g class="pa-age">
        <rect x="138" y="3" width="18" height="9" fill="#11111b" stroke="#45475a" stroke-width="0.5"/>
        <text class="pa-age-text" x="147" y="9.5" text-anchor="middle" font-family="ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace" font-size="6" font-weight="700" fill="#cdd6f4">00</text>
      </g>
    </svg>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
  // Firefly: update --mouse-x / --mouse-y on each hero as the cursor moves over it.
  document.querySelectorAll('.hero').forEach(function(hero) {
    hero.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
      var rect = hero.getBoundingClientRect();
      hero.style.setProperty('--mouse-x', (e.clientX - rect.left) + 'px');
      hero.style.setProperty('--mouse-y', (e.clientY - rect.top) + 'px');
    });
  });

  // Option 1: typewriter cycle
  var typedEl = document.getElementById('typed-role');
  if (typedEl) {
    var roles = ['Data Scientist', 'AI Engineer', 'Data Engineer', 'Builder'];
    var i = 0, j = 0, deleting = false;
    function tickType() {
      var word = roles[i];
      if (deleting) {
        j--;
        typedEl.textContent = word.slice(0, j);
        if (j === 0) { deleting = false; i = (i + 1) % roles.length; setTimeout(tickType, 400); return; }
      } else {
        j++;
        typedEl.textContent = word.slice(0, j);
        if (j === word.length) { deleting = true; setTimeout(tickType, 1600); return; }
      }
      setTimeout(tickType, deleting ? 45 : 90);
    }
    tickType();
  }

  // Option 3: sequential terminal typing
  var termEl = document.getElementById('terminal-body');
  if (termEl) {
    var script = [
      { type: 'prompt' },
      { type: 'cmd', text: 'whoami' },
      { type: 'newline' },
      { type: 'out', text: 'Roberto Park' },
      { type: 'newline' },
      { type: 'prompt' },
      { type: 'cmd', text: 'cat role.txt' },
      { type: 'newline' },
      { type: 'out', text: 'Data Scientist & AI Engineer' },
      { type: 'newline' },
      { type: 'prompt' },
      { type: 'cursor' }
    ];
    var idx = 0;
    function append(html) { termEl.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', html); }
    function runStep() {
      if (idx >= script.length) return;
      var step = script[idx++];
      if (step.type === 'prompt') {
        append('<span class="term-prompt">~/roberto $ </span>');
        setTimeout(runStep, 250);
      } else if (step.type === 'cmd') {
        var w = step.text, k = 0;
        var span = document.createElement('span');
        span.className = 'term-cmd';
        termEl.appendChild(span);
        function typeChar() {
          span.textContent = w.slice(0, ++k);
          if (k < w.length) setTimeout(typeChar, 60);
          else setTimeout(runStep, 350);
        }
        typeChar();
      } else if (step.type === 'newline') {
        append('\n');
        setTimeout(runStep, 100);
      } else if (step.type === 'out') {
        append('<span class="term-out">' + step.text + '</span>');
        setTimeout(runStep, 300);
      } else if (step.type === 'cursor') {
        append('<span class="term-cursor">_</span>');
      }
    }
    runStep();
  }

  // Option 5: pixel-art lifeline animation
  var pa = document.querySelector('.hero-pixelart');
  if (pa) {
    var ageText = pa.querySelector('.pa-age-text');
    var charG   = pa.querySelector('.pa-char');
    var sprites = {
      baby:    pa.querySelector('.pa-baby'),
      toddler: pa.querySelector('.pa-toddler'),
      kid:     pa.querySelector('.pa-kid'),
      teen:    pa.querySelector('.pa-teen'),
      adult:   pa.querySelector('.pa-adult')
    };
    var heights = { baby: 5, toddler: 8, kid: 11, teen: 14, adult: 17 };
    var flagGuate = pa.querySelector('.pa-flag-guate');
    var flagKorea = pa.querySelector('.pa-flag-korea');

    // Time(ms) → age stops. Each segment runs faster than the previous one.
    var stops = [
      { t: 0,     age: 0  },
      { t: 2800,  age: 3  },  // crawl: ~0.93s/year
      { t: 3700,  age: 4  },  // stand up: 0.9s
      { t: 7700,  age: 18 },  // walk/grow through Guatemala: ~0.29s/year
      { t: 10000, age: 29 }   // South Korea: ~0.21s/year
    ];
    var loopDur = 11800; // 1.8s pause at the end before restart

    function ageAt(t) {
      var last = stops[stops.length - 1];
      if (t >= last.t) return last.age;
      for (var i = 0; i < stops.length - 1; i++) {
        if (t < stops[i + 1].t) {
          var p = (t - stops[i].t) / (stops[i + 1].t - stops[i].t);
          return stops[i].age + p * (stops[i + 1].age - stops[i].age);
        }
      }
      return last.age;
    }
    function spriteForAge(a) {
      if (a < 3)  return 'baby';
      if (a < 4)  return 'toddler';
      if (a < 12) return 'kid';
      if (a < 18) return 'teen';
      return 'adult';
    }
    function flagForAge(a) {
      if (a < 4)  return null;
      if (a < 18) return 'guate';
      return 'korea';
    }

    var startTime = performance.now();
    function paTick(now) {
      var t = (now - startTime) % loopDur;
      var age = ageAt(t);
      var current = spriteForAge(age);

      ageText.textContent = String(Math.floor(age)).padStart(2, '0');

      for (var k in sprites) {
        sprites[k].style.display = (k === current) ? '' : 'none';
      }

      // Horizontal travel scales with age (0 → 140 across ages 0 → 29).
      var x = (age / 29) * 140;

      // Walking bob: 1px up/down. Frequency grows with age.
      var bobHz = 1.5 + (age / 29) * 6;
      var bob = (Math.sin(t / 1000 * Math.PI * 2 * bobHz) > 0 && age >= 3) ? -1 : 0;

      // Bottom of sprite sits on ground (y=33). Sprite has its own height.
      var y = 33 - heights[current] + bob;

      charG.setAttribute('transform', 'translate(' + x.toFixed(2) + ', ' + y + ')');

      flagGuate.setAttribute('opacity', flagForAge(age) === 'guate' ? '1' : '0');
      flagKorea.setAttribute('opacity', flagForAge(age) === 'korea' ? '1' : '0');

      requestAnimationFrame(paTick);
    }
    requestAnimationFrame(paTick);
  }
})();
</script>
```

{{< include assets/_aboutme.md >}}

## Explore

```{=html}
<div class="explore-grid">
  <a href="portfolio.html" class="explore-card">
    <div class="explore-card-title"><i class="bi bi-person-badge"></i> Portfolio</div>
    <p>Résumé, experience, tech stack.</p>
  </a>
  <a href="projects/projects.html" class="explore-card">
    <div class="explore-card-title"><i class="bi bi-collection"></i> Projects</div>
    <p>Case studies and code.</p>
  </a>
  <a href="notes/index.html" class="explore-card">
    <div class="explore-card-title"><i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i> Notes</div>
    <p>Technical notes across the data stack.</p>
  </a>
  <a href="blog/index.html" class="explore-card">
    <div class="explore-card-title"><i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i> Blog</div>
    <p>Long-form posts.</p>
  </a>
</div>
```
